name: Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup brown sugar and 1/4 cup granulated sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pie shell recipe. Freeze one for later use.
2. Mix all ingredients together until very well blended, adding melted butter last.
3. Put in unbaked shell and cover edges with a thin strip of foil.
4. Bake at 425°F for 15 minutes then reduce temperature to 325°F and bake for another 20 minutes.
5. Remove foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes.
6. Serve warm or cold. Terrific with whipped cream or ice cream.
